VAL-SCAF-005.evidence: docker compose ps: Container totus-db (postgres:15-alpine) is Up 8 minutes (healthy), ports 0.0.0.0:5432->5432/tcp. pg_isready: '/var/run/postgresql:5432 - accepting connections' (exit code 0).

VAL-SCAF-006.evidence: .env.local contains DATABASE_URL=postgresql://totus:totus@localhost:5432/totus. psql SELECT 1 returned successfully (exit code 0). drizzle-kit push connected to database and reported 'No changes detected' (exit code 0), confirming the application can connect via DATABASE_URL.

frictions.description: drizzle-kit push (bun run db:push) does not auto-load .env.local — DATABASE_URL must be set explicitly in the environment for drizzle-kit commands to work outside of Next.js
frictions.resolution: Ran drizzle-kit push with DATABASE_URL= prefix to set the env var explicitly

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. PostgreSQL 15 container is healthy and accepting connections on port 5432. The application connects successfully via DATABASE_URL with drizzle-kit push confirming schema sync.
